note: nowrap without ellipsis: the toast refuses to wrap so it never reflows the action bar — geometry, not truncation (R-SKIN-12 does not apply without hidden+ellipsis intent).
nowrap without ellipsis: the rigid command chip must not wrap; the text cell beside it truncates instead.

Context-scoped floor escape: the body keeps min-height 150px everywhere except inside the modal editor. A min-height-none word on the body would lose to that components-layer base — the Phase C layer finding — so the contextual zero stays local.

Context-scoped floor escape: the editor-content recipe base keeps min-height 150px; inside the modal editor the wrapper must collapse. A min-height-none word loses to the skin-layer base (the Phase C layer finding), so the contextual zero stays local.
